column2: CAA Spectrum Specialist Authorized C2 Link - Emergency Recovery Function Test
column3: ['Verify that the CAA spectrum specialist has authorized a monitored c2 link. ', "Simulate or induce a failure in the c2 link's functionality. ", 'Observe if an emergency recovery function is triggered. ', 'Confirm that the aircraft returns to home. ']
column4: ['The system displays or logs confirmation of authorization for the monitored c2 link. ', 'The c2 link fails to function correctly as intended. ', 'An emergency recovery function is activated within the system. ', "The aircraft's current location indicates it has returned to its designated home base. "]
